name: PCI DSS v4.0 — Payment Card Industry Data Security Standard
description: PCI DSS requirements for protecting cardholder data. Applies to all entities that store, process, or transmit cardholder data or sensitive authentication data.

domains.title: Req 1 — Install and Maintain Network Security Controls

controls.title: Network Security Control Processes
controls.description: Processes and mechanisms for installing and maintaining network security controls are defined and understood.

controls.title: Network Security Controls Configuration
controls.description: Network security controls are configured and maintained.

controls.title: Network Access to and from the CDE Restricted
controls.description: Network access to and from the cardholder data environment is restricted.

controls.title: Network Connections Between Trusted and Untrusted Networks
controls.description: Network connections between trusted and untrusted networks are controlled.

controls.title: Risks from Computing Devices to CDE Mitigated
controls.description: Risks to the CDE from computing devices that are able to connect to both untrusted networks and the CDE are mitigated.

domains.title: Req 2 — Apply Secure Configurations to All System Components

controls.title: Secure Configuration Processes
controls.description: Processes and mechanisms for applying secure configurations to all system components are defined and understood.

controls.title: System Components Configured Securely
controls.description: System components are configured and managed securely.

controls.title: Wireless Environments Configured and Managed Securely
controls.description: Wireless environments are configured and managed securely.

controls.title: Account Data Storage Processes
controls.description: Processes and mechanisms for protecting stored account data are defined and understood.

controls.title: Storage of Account Data is Minimized
controls.description: Storage of account data is kept to a minimum.

controls.title: Sensitive Authentication Data Not Stored After Authorization
controls.description: Sensitive authentication data (SAD) is not retained after authorization.

controls.title: Primary Account Number Secured Where Stored
controls.description: Access to displays of full PAN and ability to copy PAN are restricted.

controls.title: Primary Account Number Secured with Strong Cryptography
controls.description: Primary account number is secured wherever it is stored.

domains.title: Req 4 — Protect Cardholder Data with Strong Cryptography During Transmission

controls.title: Transmission Security Processes
controls.description: Processes and mechanisms for protecting cardholder data with strong cryptography during transmission over open, public networks are defined and understood.

controls.title: PAN Secured During Transmission
controls.description: PAN is protected with strong cryptography during transmission.

domains.title: Req 5 — Protect All Systems and Networks from Malicious Software

controls.title: Malicious Software Protection Processes
controls.description: Processes and mechanisms for protecting all systems and networks from malicious software are defined and understood.

controls.title: Malicious Software Prevented, Detected, Addressed
controls.description: Malicious software is prevented, or detected and addressed.

controls.title: Anti-Malware Mechanisms Active, Maintained, Monitored
controls.description: Anti-malware mechanisms and processes are active, maintained, and monitored.

controls.title: Anti-Phishing Mechanisms Protect Users
controls.description: Anti-phishing mechanisms protect users against phishing attacks.

domains.title: Req 6 — Develop and Maintain Secure Systems and Software

controls.title: Secure Development Processes
controls.description: Processes and mechanisms for developing and maintaining secure systems and software are defined and understood.

controls.title: Bespoke and Custom Software Developed Securely
controls.description: Bespoke and custom software are developed securely.

controls.title: Security Vulnerabilities Identified and Addressed
controls.description: Security vulnerabilities are identified and addressed.

controls.title: Public-Facing Web Applications Protected Against Attacks
controls.description: Public-facing web applications are protected against attacks.

controls.title: Changes to All System Components Managed Securely
controls.description: Changes to all system components are managed securely.

domains.title: Req 7 — Restrict Access to System Components and Cardholder Data by Business Need to Know

controls.title: Access Control Processes
controls.description: Processes and mechanisms for restricting access to system components and cardholder data by business need to know are defined and understood.

controls.title: Access to System Components and Data Appropriately Defined and Assigned
controls.description: Access to system components and data is appropriately defined and assigned.

controls.title: Access to System Components and Data Confirmed Via Access Control System(s)
controls.description: Access to system components and data is managed via an access control system(s).

domains.title: Req 8 — Identify Users and Authenticate Access to System Components

controls.title: User Identification and Authentication Processes
controls.description: Processes and mechanisms for identifying users and authenticating access to system components are defined and understood.

controls.title: User Identification and Related Accounts Managed
controls.description: User identification and related accounts for users and administrators are strictly managed throughout an account's lifecycle.

controls.title: User Authentication Managed
controls.description: User authentication is managed throughout an account's lifecycle.

controls.title: Multi-Factor Authentication Implemented
controls.description: Multi-factor authentication (MFA) is implemented to secure access into the CDE.

controls.title: Multi-Factor Authentication Systems Configured Properly
controls.description: Multi-factor authentication (MFA) systems are configured to prevent misuse.

controls.title: Use of Application and System Accounts and Associated Authentication Factors Managed
controls.description: Use of application and system accounts and associated authentication factors is strictly managed.

domains.title: Req 9 — Restrict Physical Access to Cardholder Data

controls.title: Physical Access Control Processes
controls.description: Processes and mechanisms for restricting physical access to cardholder data are defined and understood.

controls.title: Physical Access Controls for CDE
controls.description: Physical access controls manage entry into facilities and systems containing the CDE.

controls.title: Physical Access for Personnel and Visitors
controls.description: Physical access for personnel and visitors is authorized and managed.

controls.title: Media with Cardholder Data Secured
controls.description: Media with cardholder data is securely stored, accessed, distributed, and destroyed.

controls.title: Point-of-Interaction Devices Protected
controls.description: Point-of-interaction (POI) devices are protected from tampering and unauthorized substitution.

domains.title: Req 10 — Log and Monitor All Access to System Components and Cardholder Data

controls.title: Audit Log Processes
controls.description: Processes and mechanisms for logging and monitoring all access to system components and cardholder data are defined and documented.

controls.title: Audit Logs Capture All Critical Events
controls.description: Audit logs capture all critical events.

controls.title: Audit Logs Protected from Destruction and Unauthorized Modifications
controls.description: Audit logs are protected from destruction and unauthorized modifications.

controls.title: Audit Logs Reviewed to Identify Anomalies or Suspicious Activity
controls.description: Audit logs are reviewed to identify anomalies or suspicious activity.

controls.title: Audit Log History Retained and Available for Analysis
controls.description: Audit log history is retained and available for analysis.

controls.title: Time-Synchronization Mechanisms Configured and Monitored
controls.description: Time-synchronization mechanisms support consistent time settings across all systems.

controls.title: Failures of Critical Security Controls Detected, Reported, and Responded to Promptly
controls.description: Failures of critical security controls are detected, alerted, and addressed promptly.

domains.title: Req 11 — Test Security of Systems and Networks Regularly

controls.title: Security Testing Processes
controls.description: Processes and mechanisms for regularly testing security of systems and networks are defined and understood.

controls.title: Wireless Access Points Managed
controls.description: Wireless access points are identified and monitored, and unauthorized wireless access points are addressed.

controls.title: External and Internal Vulnerabilities Regularly Identified, Prioritized, and Addressed
controls.description: External and internal vulnerabilities are regularly identified, prioritized, and addressed.

controls.title: External and Internal Penetration Testing Regularly Performed
controls.description: External and internal penetration testing is regularly performed, and exploitable vulnerabilities and security weaknesses are corrected.

controls.title: Network Intrusions and Unexpected File Changes Detected and Responded To
controls.description: Network intrusions and unexpected file changes are detected and responded to.

controls.title: Unauthorized Changes on Payment Pages Detected and Responded To
controls.description: Unauthorized changes on payment pages are detected and responded to.

domains.title: Req 12 — Support Information Security with Organizational Policies and Programs

controls.title: Comprehensive Information Security Policy Established
controls.description: A comprehensive information security policy is established, published, maintained, and disseminated.

controls.title: Acceptable Use Policies Implemented
controls.description: Acceptable use policies for end-user technologies are documented and implemented.

controls.title: Risks to the CDE Formally Identified, Evaluated, and Managed
controls.description: Risks to the cardholder data environment are formally identified, evaluated, and managed.

controls.title: PCI DSS Compliance Managed
controls.description: PCI DSS compliance is managed.

controls.title: PCI DSS Scope is Documented and Validated
controls.description: PCI DSS scope is documented and validated.

controls.title: Security Awareness Education Ongoing
controls.description: A security awareness program is implemented to make all personnel aware of the entity's information security policy and procedures, and their role in protecting the cardholder data.

controls.title: Personnel Screened to Reduce Insider Threats
controls.description: Personnel are screened to reduce risks from insider threats.

controls.title: Third-Party Service Providers with Whom Account Data is Shared are Managed
controls.description: Risk to information assets associated with third-party service provider (TPSP) relationships is managed.

controls.title: Third-Party Service Providers Support PCI DSS Compliance
controls.description: Third-party service providers (TPSPs) support their customers' PCI DSS compliance.

controls.title: Suspected and Confirmed Security Incidents Responded to Immediately
controls.description: Suspected and confirmed security incidents that could impact the CDE are responded to immediately.
